title: Iran says Hormuz closed as US-Iran deal falters over Lebanon

snapshot.title: Iran says Hormuz closed as US-Iran deal falters over Lebanon
snapshot.description: BEIRUT: Iran said Saturday it was closing the Strait of Hormuz again over Israeli attacks in Lebanon, jolting a fragile US-Iran agreement just as negotiators headed to Switzerland to try to salvage efforts to end the Middle East war. Follow-up talks had been planned in Switzerland on Friday, but were postponed at the last minute after Israel launched deadly strikes in Lebanon
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Iran says Hormuz closed as US-Iran deal falters over Lebanon | Arab News
